articles.author: Andrew Liszewski
articles.title: Logitech’s new Mobi Fold squeezes a lot of functionality into a tiny folding mouse - The Verge
articles.description: Logitech’s new Mobi Fold is a compact travel mouse that manages to get even smaller by folding in half without skimping on features.

articles.author: Dharvi Vaid
articles.title: NASA picks first European astronaut for Artemis mission - DW
articles.description: Italian astronaut Luca Parmitano will be the lead pilot for the Artemis III test flight. The NASA mission is expected to launch in 2027 to test technology for a future moon landing.
articles.content:
NASA has tapped Italian astronaut Luca Parmitano to pilot the Artemis III mission, making him the first European to be a part of the US space agency's key human spaceflight campaign.
